title: Balawai militia

The '''[[Balawai]] militia''' was the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] name for the law-enforcement and military forces of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal's]] [[Representative Council]] government. It was a part of the [[Ministry of Justice (Balawai)|Ministry of Justice]], and was headquartered in the [[Ministry of Justice Building]] in [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]]. As of [[22 BBY/Legends|21.5 BBY]], it was under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Lorz Geptun]].

During the [[Summertime War]], the [[Militia/Legends|militia]] was engaged in a protracted conflict with native [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] guerrillas such as the [[Upland Liberation Front|ULF]], a struggle often marked with atrocities on both sides. After the end of the war, the militia remained, but was downsized and limited primarily to law enforcement. Many former militiamen joined the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic Army]] to serve in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Even at the height of the Summertime War, the militia's written bylaws forbade threatening civilians.

==Forces==
As of 21.5 BBY, the militia forces included:
*At least 25,000 conventional troops
*At least 200 [[Arpitrooper|arpitroop]]s
*At least 36 [[Ground assault vehicle/Legends|Ground Assault Vehicles]]
*At least 76 [[Turbostorm-class gunship]]s
*[[De-Orbiting Kinetic Anti-emplacement Weapon|DOKAW]]s, spy satellites, and communications satellites
*Troop shuttles
*[[armored groundcar]]s

[[Jup]]s were also used as auxiliary units. Under its alliance with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the militia also received at least 384 [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droids]]. It used twenty-man [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]].

==Equipment==
Each militia regular was equipped with [[Graylite]] body armor, a [[Merr-Sonn Devastator]] [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknife]], and a [[BC7 medium blaster carbine|BC7 Medium Blaster Carbine]]. Each platoon had a [[MM(X)]], and every sixth soldier had a backpack flamethrower.
